Poker Hand #HD3333333333: Hold'em No Limit ($0.05/$0.10) - 2024/01/15 20:32:00
Table 'Rush&Cash1' 6-Max Seat #1 is the button
Seat 1: Villain1 ($10.00 in chips)
Seat 2: Hero ($10.00 in chips)
Seat 3: Villain2 ($10.00 in chips)
Seat 4: Villain3 ($10.00 in chips)
Seat 5: Villain4 ($10.00 in chips)
Seat 6: Villain5 ($10.00 in chips)
Villain2: posts small blind $0.05
Villain3: posts big blind $0.10
*** HOLE CARDS ***
Dealt to Hero [Ac Kc]
Villain4: folds [Fast Fold]
Villain5: folds [Fast Fold]
Villain1: folds
Hero: raises $0.20 to $0.30
Villain2: folds
Villain3: raises $0.70 to $0.80
Hero: calls $0.50
*** FLOP *** [Kh 8d 2s]
Villain3: bets $0.60
Hero: calls $0.60
*** TURN *** [Kh 8d 2s] [Ac]
Villain3: bets $1.20
Hero: raises $2.80 to $4.00
Villain3: calls $2.80
*** RIVER *** [Kh 8d 2s Ac] [3d]
Villain3: checks
Hero: bets $4.60
Villain3: calls $4.60
*** SHOW DOWN ***
Hero: shows [Ac Kc] (two pair, Aces and Kings)
Villain3: shows [Kd Ks] (three of a kind, Kings)
Villain3 collected $18.20 from pot
*** SUMMARY ***
Total pot $19.00 | Rake $0.80
Board [Kh 8d 2s Ac 3d]
Seat 1: Villain1 (button) folded before Flop (didn't bet)
Seat 2: Hero (small blind) showed [Ac Kc] and lost
Seat 3: Villain2 folded before Flop (didn't bet)
Seat 4: Villain3 (big blind) showed [Kd Ks] and won ($18.20) with three of a kind, Kings
Seat 5: Villain4 folded before Flop (didn't bet)
Seat 6: Villain5 folded before Flop (didn't bet)
